acknowledgement.description: Days ICC has to acknowledge a new complaint before escalation begins

levels.name: ICC Reminder
levels.description: Remind ICC that acknowledgement deadline was missed

levels.name: Audit Committee
levels.description: Escalate to Audit Committee when ICC fails to act

levels.name: District Officer
levels.description: Escalate to District Officer / Nodal Officer when Audit Committee fails

orchestration.description: API call timeout and daily safety-net cron for checking all pending complaints

bot.description: Proactive bot message in Teams personal chat

teams_activity.description: Activity feed notification via Graph API TeamsActivity.Send — shows in Teams Activity bell

complaint_submitted.description: Complaint has been submitted by employee

icc_presiding_officer.subject: [Rakshak] New POSH Complaint: {{complaintNumber}}

icc_all_members.subject: [Rakshak] New POSH Complaint: {{complaintNumber}}
icc_all_members.body:
A new POSH complaint ({{complaintNumber}}) has been filed. The Presiding Officer has been notified. Please coordinate with the ICC for timely acknowledgement.

Deadline to acknowledge: {{deadlineDate}}

complainant.message:
Your complaint has been submitted successfully.

**Complaint ID:** {{complaintNumber}}
**Status:** Submitted

The Internal Complaints Committee has been notified and must acknowledge within {{deadlineDays}} days. You can check the status anytime by messaging me or opening the Rakshak tab.
Your complaint ({{complaintNumber}}) has been acknowledged by the Internal Complaints Committee. An inquiry will now begin and must be completed within {{inquiryDeadlineDays}} days.

icc_reminder.description: ICC failed to acknowledge within deadline — reminder

icc_presiding_officer.subject: [Rakshak] OVERDUE: Complaint {{complaintNumber}} — Acknowledgement Deadline Missed
icc_presiding_officer.body:
Complaint {{complaintNumber}} has NOT been acknowledged. The deadline was {{deadlineDate}}.

This is an automated reminder. If no action is taken within {{escalationWaitDays}} days, the complaint will be automatically escalated to the Audit Committee.

Please act immediately.

icc_all_members.subject: [Rakshak] OVERDUE: Complaint {{complaintNumber}} — Acknowledgement Deadline Missed
icc_all_members.body: Complaint {{complaintNumber}} has not been acknowledged and the deadline ({{deadlineDate}}) has passed. Please coordinate with the Presiding Officer to take immediate action.

escalated_audit_committee.description: Escalated to Audit Committee due to ICC inaction

escalation_contacts_level_1.subject: [Rakshak] ESCALATION: POSH Complaint {{complaintNumber}} — ICC Failed to Act

icc_presiding_officer.subject: [Rakshak] NOTICE: Complaint {{complaintNumber}} Escalated to Audit Committee
icc_presiding_officer.body: Complaint {{complaintNumber}} has been escalated to the Audit Committee because the ICC did not acknowledge within {{deadlineDays}} days. This escalation has been logged in the audit trail.

complainant_escalated_audit.description: Notify complainant that complaint was escalated to Audit Committee

complainant.message:
Your complaint ({{complaintNumber}}) has been escalated to the **Audit Committee** because the Internal Complaints Committee did not respond within the required {{deadlineDays}}-day timeframe.

This escalation is automatic and has been logged. The Audit Committee has been notified and is expected to take action.

escalated_district_officer.description: Escalated to District Officer due to Audit Committee inaction

escalation_contacts_level_2.subject: [Rakshak] FINAL ESCALATION: POSH Complaint {{complaintNumber}} — All Internal Authorities Failed to Act

nodal_officer.subject: [Rakshak] FINAL ESCALATION: Complaint {{complaintNumber}} — District Officer Notification
nodal_officer.body: POSH complaint {{complaintNumber}} has been escalated to the District Officer after failure by both the ICC and Audit Committee. This notification is sent to the Nodal Officer for SHe-Box compliance tracking.

icc_presiding_officer.subject: [Rakshak] NOTICE: Complaint {{complaintNumber}} Escalated to District Officer
icc_presiding_officer.body: Complaint {{complaintNumber}} has been escalated to the District Officer. Both the ICC and Audit Committee failed to act within required timeframes. This has been logged.

complainant_escalated_district.description: Notify complainant that complaint was escalated to District Officer

complainant.message:
Your complaint ({{complaintNumber}}) has been escalated to the **District Officer** as neither the Internal Complaints Committee nor the Audit Committee responded within the required timeframes.

This is the highest level of automatic escalation. All actions have been logged in a tamper-proof audit trail.

icc_inquiry_reminder.description: Periodic reminder to ICC about inquiry deadline

icc_presiding_officer.subject: [Rakshak] Inquiry Deadline Reminder: {{daysRemaining}} days remaining — {{complaintNumber}}
icc_presiding_officer.body:
The inquiry for complaint {{complaintNumber}} must be completed within {{daysRemaining}} days (deadline: {{inquiryDeadlineDate}}).

Please ensure the inquiry is progressing as required under Section 11 of the POSH Act, 2013.

icc_inquiry_urgent.description: Urgent reminder — 5 days left for inquiry

icc_presiding_officer.subject: [Rakshak] URGENT: Only {{daysRemaining}} days remaining for inquiry — {{complaintNumber}}

icc_all_members.subject: [Rakshak] URGENT: {{daysRemaining}} days remaining — {{complaintNumber}}
icc_all_members.body: The inquiry for complaint {{complaintNumber}} has {{daysRemaining}} days remaining. Please coordinate with the Presiding Officer to ensure timely completion.

icc_inquiry_final.description: Final day warning for inquiry completion

icc_presiding_officer.subject: [Rakshak] FINAL DAY: Inquiry for {{complaintNumber}} must complete TODAY
icc_presiding_officer.body:
TODAY is the final day to complete the inquiry for complaint {{complaintNumber}} per POSH Act Section 11.

If the inquiry is not marked as completed by end of day, this will be logged as a statutory deadline breach and escalated.

icc_all_members.subject: [Rakshak] FINAL DAY: Inquiry for {{complaintNumber}} must complete TODAY
icc_all_members.body: The statutory 90-day inquiry deadline for complaint {{complaintNumber}} expires TODAY. Please ensure resolution is submitted through the Rakshak ICC Dashboard.

complainant_inquiry_breached.description: Notify complainant that 90-day inquiry deadline was breached

complainant.message:
The **90-day inquiry deadline** for your complaint ({{complaintNumber}}) has passed without resolution.

This statutory breach has been logged and the matter has been escalated. You have the right to approach the District Officer or file a case directly.

complaint_resolved.description: Complaint has been resolved by ICC

complainant.message:
Your complaint ({{complaintNumber}}) has been **resolved** by the Internal Complaints Committee.

You can view the full resolution details in the Rakshak tab. If you are not satisfied with the outcome, you have the right to appeal within 90 days per Section 18 of the POSH Act.

complaint_appealed_audit_committee.description: Complainant has appealed the complaint to the Audit Committee

escalation_contacts_level_1.subject: [Rakshak] APPEAL: POSH Complaint {{complaintNumber}} — Complainant Has Appealed
escalation_contacts_level_1.body:
The complainant in POSH complaint {{complaintNumber}} has filed a formal appeal to the Audit Committee.

Reason for appeal (in complainant's words):
"{{appealReason}}"

Current complaint status: {{currentStatus}}
Submitted on: {{submittedDate}}

Per Section 177(9-10) of the Companies Act, 2013 and the organization's vigil mechanism, the Audit Committee is requested to review the handling of this complaint and take appropriate action.

This appeal has been logged in the tamper-proof audit trail.

icc_presiding_officer.subject: [Rakshak] NOTICE: Complainant Appealed Complaint {{complaintNumber}} to Audit Committee
icc_presiding_officer.body:
The complainant in complaint {{complaintNumber}} has filed an appeal to the Audit Committee.

Reason provided: "{{appealReason}}"

Please cooperate with the Audit Committee's review. This appeal has been logged.

complainant.message:
Your appeal to the **Audit Committee** for complaint ({{complaintNumber}}) has been filed successfully.

The Audit Committee has been notified along with the reason you provided. Your appeal has been logged in the tamper-proof audit trail. You'll be notified when they respond.

complaint_appealed_district_officer.description: Complainant has appealed the complaint to the District Officer

escalation_contacts_level_2.subject: [Rakshak] APPEAL: POSH Complaint {{complaintNumber}} — Complainant Appealed to District Officer
escalation_contacts_level_2.body:
The complainant in POSH complaint {{complaintNumber}} has filed a formal appeal to the District Officer.

Reason for appeal (in complainant's words):
"{{appealReason}}"

Current complaint status: {{currentStatus}}
Submitted on: {{submittedDate}}

Per Section 6 of the POSH Act, 2013, the District Officer is requested to review the handling of this complaint and take appropriate action, which may include constituting a Local Complaints Committee.

This appeal has been logged in the tamper-proof audit trail.

nodal_officer.subject: [Rakshak] APPEAL: Complaint {{complaintNumber}} — District Officer Notification
nodal_officer.body:
POSH complaint {{complaintNumber}} has been appealed by the complainant to the District Officer. This notification is sent to the Nodal Officer for SHe-Box compliance tracking.

Reason: "{{appealReason}}"

icc_presiding_officer.subject: [Rakshak] NOTICE: Complainant Appealed Complaint {{complaintNumber}} to District Officer
icc_presiding_officer.body:
The complainant in complaint {{complaintNumber}} has filed an appeal directly to the District Officer.

Reason provided: "{{appealReason}}"

This appeal has been logged.

complainant.message:
Your appeal to the **District Officer** for complaint ({{complaintNumber}}) has been filed successfully.

The District Officer (and Nodal Officer) has been notified along with the reason you provided. Your appeal has been logged in the tamper-proof audit trail. You'll be notified when they respond.

You also retain the right to approach the courts directly under Section 18 of the POSH Act.

criminal_threshold_alert.description: Complaint crosses from POSH (civil) into BNS (criminal) territory

icc_presiding_officer.subject: [Rakshak] CRIMINAL THRESHOLD: Complaint {{complaintNumber}} may involve criminal conduct

complainant.message:
Based on what you've shared, your complaint ({{complaintNumber}}) may involve conduct that goes beyond workplace harassment into **criminal territory** under the Bharatiya Nyaya Sanhita, 2023 (Sections {{bnsSections}}).

This has been flagged to the ICC. You also have the right to file a police complaint — the employer is legally required to assist you with this under Section 19 of the POSH Act.
